title: North India Sizzles Under Intense Heatwave; Prayagraj Hits 45°C As Delhi Goes On Yellow Alert
description: North and Central India are facing a severe early-season heatwave, with temperatures reaching record-breaking levels. Prayagraj (Uttar Pradesh) has officially recorded the highest temperature in the country at 45.2°C, while cities across Rajasthan are trailing closely behind at near-45°C marks.
